passives.name: Cleave
passives.effects: Damaging basic attacks deal {{as|{{rd|40% AD|20% AD}}|ad}} {{as|physical damage}} to other enemies in a {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 350 radius centered around the target.

active.name: Heretical Cleave
active.effects: Deal {{as|80% AD}} {{as|physical damage}} to enemies in a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 450 radius.

effects_structured.raw: Damaging basic attacks deal 40% (20% for ranged) AD physical damage to other enemies in a 350 radius around the target.
Active: Deal 80% AD physical damage to enemies in a 450 radius.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Cleave applies splash physical damage around the primary basic-attack target, with melee/ranged damage split (40% vs 20% AD).
Execution model: Heretical Cleave is a self-centered active area hit (450 radius) with a 10-second cooldown and immediate resolution on cast.
Wave 125 (2026-02-25): Backfilled explicit active-cast execution fields (`effect_hitbox_radius`, `cast_windup_seconds`) from page-verified active area geometry and timing semantics.
